summary: Treatment with *Bacillus Calmette-Guérin* (BCG) is indeed used as a standard immunotherapy for high-grade non-musicular invasive bladder cancers and carcinoma in situ due to its proven ability to reduce recurrence and prevent disease progression through immune activation. This makes BCG an essential component of frontline management for these specific subtypes of bladder cancer.
